zh.Morpeth, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯
zh.Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾格利斯索普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Greystoke於大約1190年出生在英國波藍德格斯托可時，他的父親William FitzRanulf de Greystoke24歲，母親Helewise de Stuteville20歲。他於1219年與Christian Veteripont在英國波藍德格斯托可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1247年在英國越可爾格利斯索普享年59歲。

zh-hans.Morpeth, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯
zh-hans.Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾格利斯索普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Greystoke于大约1190年出生在英国波藍德格斯托可时，他的父亲William FitzRanulf de Greystoke24岁，母亲Helewise de Stuteville20岁。他于1219年与Christian Veteripont在英国波藍德格斯托可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1247年在英国越可爾格利斯索普享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Greystoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Greystoke was born about 1190, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, his father, William FitzRanulf de Greystoke, was 24 and his mother, Helewise de Stuteville, was 20. He married Christian Veteripont in 1219, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1247, in Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Greystoke est né environ 1190, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, William FitzRanulf de Greystoke, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Helewise de Stuteville, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Christian Veteripont en 1219, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1247, à Grimesthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Greystoke um 1190 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William FitzRanulf de Greystoke 24 und seine Mutter Helewise de Stuteville 20. Er hat 1219 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England Christian Veteripont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1247 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Greystoke è nato il circa 1190 nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, William FitzRanulf de Greystoke, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Helewise de Stuteville, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Christian Veteripont nel 1219, nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1247, nel Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.Morpeth, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランドモーペス
ja.Greystoke, Northumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドグレイストク
ja.Greystoke, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドグレイストク
ja.Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアグリメスソルペ
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Greystokeが約1190年にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクで生まれた時，父William FitzRanulf de Greystokeは24歳，母Helewise de Stutevilleは20歳であった。1219年にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクでChristian Veteripontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1247年にイギリスヨークシュアイアグリメスソルペで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Greystoke(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 쿠벌랜드 그리스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William FitzRanulf de Greystoke(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Helewise de Stuteville(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1219년 영국 쿠벌랜드 그리스토크에서 Christian Veteripont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1247년 영국 요르크실르 그라임스소에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1190 date fits better–about 1247: tany ho any amin'ny 1190–tany ho any amin'ny 1247

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Greystoke nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzRanulf de Greystoke, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Helewise de Stuteville, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Christian Veteripont em 1219, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1247, em Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Greystoke родился около 1190 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William FitzRanulf de Greystoke было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Helewise de Stuteville, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian Veteripont в 1219 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1247 г. в местности гриместаурп, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

sm.about 1190 date fits better–about 1247: e tusa o le 1190–e tusa o le 1247

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Greystoke nació aproximadamente 1190, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William FitzRanulf de Greystoke, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Helewise de Stuteville, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Christian Veteripont en 1219, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1247, en Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
